name: hopgraph
description: Verify Australian and New Zealand businesses against government registers. Surfaces regulatory findings across jurisdictions that no single register search can reveal.

auth.instructions: Get a free API key at https://hopgraph.com/signup

tools.name: verify_business
tools.description: Verify any Australian or New Zealand business against government registers. Returns registration status, directors, licences, trading names, and a three-tier risk assessment (CLEAR / ADVISORY / FLAGS_FOUND).

identifier.description: ABN, ACN, NZBN, or company name to verify

country.description: Optional: 'AU' or 'NZ'. Auto-detected from identifier format if omitted.

tools.name: search_business
tools.description: Search Australian and New Zealand business entities by name. Covers 2.3 million+ Australian companies, 3.2 million business names, and New Zealand NZBN-registered entities.

query.description: Business name or partial name to search for

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 20, max 50)

tools.name: get_verification
tools.description: Retrieve a previously generated compliance verification record by its unique audit UID.

verification_uid.description: The verification UID (UUID) returned by a previous verify_business call

tools.name: get_verification_history
tools.description: Retrieve the verification history for a specific entity. Requires Professional or Business tier.

identifier.description: ABN, ACN, NZBN, or company name used in previous verify_business calls

limit.description: Maximum number of history records to return (default 20, max 100)
